title: Republic Special Tactics
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Republic Special Tactics''' was an elite military unit within the [[Outland Regions Security Force/Legends|Republic Outland Regions Security Force]] during the [[Second Battle of Zonama Sekot]] in [[29 BBY/Legends|29 BBY]].<ref name="Rogue Planet">''[[Rogue Planet]]''</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[Rogue Planet]]''
